rationale: Answer key group=control, scheme_type=null, so this is a control case. DIM1: output misstatement_probability=25; control rule p<=30 -> band 2. DIM2: control case -> null (mechanism not graded). DIM3: control case -> nulls. DIM4: The output cites specific provided data points with accession numbers and dates that genuinely support its claims (e.g., Goodwill=8747200000 (2017-05-28) -> 14065000000 (2018-05-27), IntangibleAssetsNetExcludingGoodwill 4530400000->7445100000, ReceivablesNetCurrent 1430100000->1684200000 vs revenue 15619800000->15740400000, AllowanceForDoubtfulAccounts 29600000->24300000 with corresponding receivables, and NetIncomeLoss vs OperatingCashFlow across FY2015-FY2018). This is a coherent multi-year/multi-point combination -> 3. Cap check: declared p=25 (<40) requires clear/watch; risk_tier="watch" is consistent, so no cap applied. MEMORIZATION: reasoning repeatedly points at concrete provided data content (not just listing documents); the Blue Buffalo acquisition referenced closed within the FY2018 data window and is supported by provided Assets figures, and no post-cutoff revelation/enforcement/outcome facts are cited -> false.
